race.description: Mekka Raceday On Sale Now 3YO Fillies Mdn Plate
race.comment: Tricky race to assess with many of these facing the starter for the first time. Of the raced brigade QUEEN OLYMPIAS (12) just ran into one better at Ipswich on debut and will have derived a stack of benefit from that race day experience. Looks ready for the step-up in trip now and should be going very close. BOONIE BOOM (1) is on debut but looked handy winning a recent Doomben trial and must be respected out of the champion Gollan barn. Keep very safe. SUMMER SENSATION (13) resumes here but showed enough in her first campaign to warrant consideration in a race like this. Can run a race while fresh. METRIC (15) just missed the frame in town on debut before being given further time to mature. Include from the low draw. CRYPTO CHICK (3) next best with the 3kg claim.
